values.description: AI-Chatbot service base URL (FastAPI). No auth required.
ChatModel service base URL (Express). JWT auth required.
JWT Bearer token for Service B. Paste your token here (without 'Bearer' prefix).
AI-Chatbot session UUID. Auto-set by the 'Text Chat — First Message' test script.
Uploaded document UUID. Auto-set by 'Step 1 — Initiate Upload' test script.
GCS signed upload URL. Auto-set by 'Step 1 — Initiate Upload' test script.
Session ID for general legal chat (no document).

info.name: JuriNex Dev
info.description:
Development environment for JuriNex AI Chatbot API.

Setup:
1. Set jwt_token to a valid JWT from your auth service
2. Run requests in order — test scripts auto-populate session_id, file_id, upload_url

For production, create a separate environment with production URLs.
